extracted_items.supersedes_content: comfygit project is deployed on Heroku
extracted_items.content: comfygit project is deployed on Fly.io (migrated from Heroku last week). Primary region: iad (US East). Singapore (sin) expansion is a future consideration but not yet decided.

extracted_items.supersedes_content: comfygit API is currently on v2
extracted_items.content: comfygit API is on v3 (v2 fully deprecated last month). v2 endpoints return 410 Gone. Migration guide: docs.comfygit.org/migration/v3. Key breaking changes in v3: authentication moved to OAuth2 PKCE, /workflows endpoint renamed to /environments.

extracted_items.supersedes_content: comfygit uses Redis for job queue processing
extracted_items.content: comfygit uses PostgreSQL-backed job queuing with pgqueue Python library (migrated from Redis). Processes ~500 jobs/day. Redis was deemed overkill for current scale.
comfygit database is Neon serverless PostgreSQL (migrated from AWS RDS). Chosen for cost efficiency with variable workload pattern and branching capability for staging environments.
comfygit workflow endpoint is /environments (renamed from /workflows in API v3)
